scope: ACL supplement derivation-section layout iteration for the proxy-metric companion and adjacent grounding companion.
claim_boundary: The AI-generated proxy-metric axis slot is exposition only. It is not experimental evidence, a metric, a model prediction, a benchmark row, a render result, or a task result. Registered render pairs and the written formulas remain the evidence-bearing content.

ai_generated_slot.visual_review: Abstract proxy-axis schematic with no readable paper-critical text and no realistic scene evidence. Suitable as a replaceable exposition slot.

standalone_figure.visual_review: Deterministic composite with registered object and scene render pairs, a bottom registered render audit strip, and one clearly separated AI schematic card. No visible overlap after footer-strip adjustment.

pages.visual_review: Proxy companion is readable and anchored immediately after paired-render notation. No isolated caption page.
SSIM, feature similarity, point-in-box, normalized-coordinate definitions, grounding companion, and caption share the page without overflow.
Navigation derivation companion page; not a caption-only or blank page.
Metric-boundary bridge page remains dense and readable.

positive: AI-generated proxy-metric schematic used only for exposition
not a new metric, model prediction, or task result
negative: Red material in these diagnostic cases

notes: The prior v1 companion used a smaller proxy_metric_lens slot and ended up as a compact page-bottom visual.

This v2 pass replaced that slot with a cleaner proxy_metric_axis imagegen asset, added a registered proxy render audit strip, moved the figure after paired-render notation, and removed a caption-only page by reducing the adjacent grounding companion height.
